Package dontlookback

Class InventorySystem

java.lang.Object
dontlookback.InventorySystem
public class InventorySystem extends Object
Comprehensive Inventory System for Don't Look Back Manages player inventory including light sources, keys, tools, and collectibles. Supports item stacking, categorization, quick-use slots, and persistence. Features: - Multi-category item organization - Stack management for consumables - Quick-use hotbar for essential items - Weight and capacity limits - Item condition tracking - Auto-sorting and filtering
Version:
1.0
Author:
DLB Team

    • registerItem

      public void registerItem(InventorySystem.InventoryItem item)
      Register a new item type
      Parameters:
      item - Item template to register

    • createItem

      public InventorySystem.InventoryItem createItem(String itemId, int quantity)
      Create an item instance from registry
      Parameters:
      itemId - ID of item to create
      quantity - Quantity to create
      Returns:
      New item instance, or null if not found

    • addItem

      public boolean addItem(InventorySystem.InventoryItem item)
      Add an item to inventory
      Parameters:
      item - Item to add
      Returns:
      true if successfully added, false if inventory full

    • addItem

      public boolean addItem(String itemId, int quantity)
      Add item by ID and quantity
      Parameters:
      itemId - Item ID from registry
      quantity - Quantity to add
      Returns:
      true if successfully added

    • removeItem

      public InventorySystem.InventoryItem removeItem(int slotIndex, int quantity)
      Remove item from inventory
      Parameters:
      slotIndex - Slot to remove from
      quantity - Quantity to remove (for stackable items)
      Returns:
      Removed item, or null if slot empty

    • useItem

      public boolean useItem(int slotIndex)
      Use/consume an item
      Parameters:
      slotIndex - Slot containing item to use
      Returns:
      true if item was used successfully

      public void sortInventory()
      Sort inventory by category and item type

    • setHotbarSlot

      public boolean setHotbarSlot(int hotbarIndex, int inventoryIndex)
      Set hotbar slot to point to inventory slot
      Parameters:
      hotbarIndex - Hotbar slot index (0-7)
      inventoryIndex - Inventory slot index
      Returns:
      true if successfully set

      Returns:

Don't Look Back - Horror Survival Game Engine

Built with Java 17, LWJGL 3.3.4, JBox2D | GitHub Repository | Report Issues
